Asavari.description: Morning raga (5–8 AM). Komal Ga, Dha, Ni. Serene and devotional character.
Asavari.notes: Komal (flat) Ga, Dha, Ni give it a melancholic-yet-peaceful quality.

mean_pitch.label: Mean Pitch (Hz)
mean_pitch.description: Average fundamental frequency of voiced segments

oscillation_depth.label: Oscillation Depth (Hz)
oscillation_depth.description: Peak-to-peak range of pitch variations (gamaka span)

oscillation_rate.label: Oscillation Rate (Hz)
oscillation_rate.description: Frequency of pitch oscillations per second

pitch_continuity.label: Pitch Continuity
pitch_continuity.description: Fraction of frames with detected voiced pitch (0–1)

pitch_drift.label: Pitch Drift (Hz/s)
pitch_drift.description: Linear drift of pitch over the recording

spectral_centroid.label: Spectral Centroid (Hz)
spectral_centroid.description: Brightness of the tone; higher → brighter timbre

std_pitch.label: Pitch Std Dev (Hz)
std_pitch.description: Standard deviation of pitch — measures melodic range

Yaman.description: Evening raga (6–9 PM). Tivra (sharp) Madhyam. Peaceful and romantic.
Yaman.notes: All shuddha swaras except tivra Ma (F#). Full both octaves, wide range.

mean_pitch.label: Mean Pitch (Hz)
mean_pitch.description: Average fundamental frequency of voiced segments

oscillation_depth.label: Oscillation Depth (Hz)
oscillation_depth.description: Peak-to-peak range of pitch variations (gamaka span)

oscillation_rate.label: Oscillation Rate (Hz)
oscillation_rate.description: Frequency of pitch oscillations per second

pitch_continuity.label: Pitch Continuity
pitch_continuity.description: Fraction of frames with detected voiced pitch (0–1)

pitch_drift.label: Pitch Drift (Hz/s)
pitch_drift.description: Linear drift of pitch over the recording

spectral_centroid.label: Spectral Centroid (Hz)
spectral_centroid.description: Brightness of the tone; Yaman tends toward brighter timbre

std_pitch.label: Pitch Std Dev (Hz)
std_pitch.description: Standard deviation of pitch — Yaman covers a wide melodic range

Sarang.description: Afternoon raga (12–3 PM). Komal Nishad. Joyful and playful character.
Sarang.notes: Vrindavani Sarang: uses both Ma and Pa. Active gamaka on Re.

mean_pitch.label: Mean Pitch (Hz)
mean_pitch.description: Average fundamental frequency of voiced segments

oscillation_depth.description: Peak-to-peak range of pitch variations (gamaka span)

oscillation_rate.label: Oscillation Rate (Hz)
oscillation_rate.description: Frequency of pitch oscillations — Sarang is ornament-heavy

pitch_continuity.description: Fraction of frames with detected voiced pitch (0–1)
